english: Adds torque and power to any vehicle by adding a hybrid battery and motor. Provides modest fuel savings for gas-powered vehicles.

Fast travel currency. Used to unlock new transporters from Stronghold to the traders.

Click [decea3]Use[-] to donate one opal towards unlocking the next trader transporter.

Read more about the unlocking transporters with the [decea3]/transporters[-] chat command. See the current transporter status with [decea3]/transporters status[-].
Locate and visit the Stronghold to unlock the /stronghold and /sh teleport commands.
Complete 5 quests to unlock the /bed teleport command.
